content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Completed the parsimonious bead-creation remediation in the current tree: the propose-new-bead service path checks active-bead ownership before any creation attempt, terminal reconciliation emits propose_new_bead_pending events for below-threshold groups, and covered-by-existing comment idempotency now includes finding and proposed-scope content so distinct findings in the same run are preserved. Regression coverage exists for active-bead matches, distinct covered-by-existing findings, below-threshold pending journaling, threshold creation, and disabled lookup behavior.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the pending amendments against src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs and src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs.
1. [Completed] Verified the source diff implements active-bead ownership blocking before creation, terminal pending journal events, and finding/scope-aware covered-by-existing comment deduplication.
2. [Completed] Confirmed regression tests cover active-bead ownership, distinct same-run covered-by-existing comments, below-threshold pending journaling, creation at threshold, and disabled parsimonious lookup behavior.
3. [Completed] Ran targeted propose-new-bead regression tests.
4. [Completed] Ran full cargo test, clippy, fmt check, and nix build verification gates.
5. [Skipped] Run br lint after backlog edits.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub propose_new_bead -- --nocapture passed: 49 lib tests and 6 unit tests matched; all passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub passed: 1325 lib tests passed with 6 ignored, 378 CLI tests passed with 3 ignored, run_attach_tmux passed, 1126 unit tests passed with 1 ignored, and doc tests were ignored as expected.
- nix develop -c cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings passed.
- nix build passed.
- git diff --stat for the reviewed source files reports changes only in src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs and src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs for this remediation scope.

## Outstanding Risks

- The working tree still has pre-existing dirty files outside the reviewed source diff: .ralph-burning/projects/ni86-1/journal.ndjson, .ralph-burning/projects/ni86-1/run.json, src/cli/run.rs, and src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs. They were left untouched.
- br lint was skipped because no .beads backlog files were edited in this remediation round.
